name: Screen Capture with Import Tool
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Screen Capture with Import Tool
SIGMA Description: Detects adversary creating screen capture of a desktop with Import Tool.
Highly recommended using rule on servers, due to high usage of screenshot utilities on user workstations.
ImageMagick must be installed.


False positives:
- Legitimate use of screenshot utility

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%import%') AND ((LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-window%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%root%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a3%.png%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.jpg%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.jpeg%')) OR (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%.png%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.jpg%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.jpeg%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Screen Capture with Import Tool on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%import%') AND ((LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-window%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%root%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a3%.png%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.jpg%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.jpeg%')) OR (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%.png%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.jpg%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.jpeg%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Screen Capture with Import Tool

This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
